name: Clickys
description: Clickys is a modern multi-platform affiliate marketplace designed to help users discover, compare, and shop the best products from leading online stores like Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, AJIO, and more all in one place.Built with a fast and responsive Next.js architecture, Clickys delivers a smooth shopping experience with smart product discovery, affiliate-based category browsing, product comparisons, trending deals, and SEO-optimized buying guides. The platform integrates dynamically with Prismic CMS, allowing scalable content management and future affiliate expansion without rebuilding the system.
